bootstrap.cluster_resampling: pairs, then seeds within selected pair
bootstrap.sample_resampling: canonical examples sampled synchronously across every pair/seed cell, stratified by task

A_pre_transfer.reason: Available before transfer, but raw benchmark text creates memorization/lookup risk.
A_pre_transfer.use: deployment input; excluded from the primary scalar selector

A_pre_transfer.reason: Known before transfer but can learn base rates and weaken leave-one-group generalization.
A_pre_transfer.use: group metadata only unless an explicitly task/pair-aware policy is preregistered

A_pre_transfer.reason: Receiver-tokenized prompt length is exactly recomputable before model forward.
Computed during tokenizer/alignment input preparation before the fused forward.
A_pre_transfer.use: eligible primary alignment features after redundancy filtering

B_post_fused_forward.use: diagnostic only for a no-transfer selector

B_post_fused_forward.reason: Summarized from projector records after the fused call.
Derived from the generated fused answer when populated.

C_receiver_dual_pass_upper_bound.reason: Requires a complete receiver-only forward; current artifacts do not contain logits, margins, or calibrated confidence.

D_forbidden_or_leaky.reason: Contains the label or a direct label-derived target.
D_forbidden_or_leaky.use: outcome construction only; forbidden selector input

D_forbidden_or_leaky.reason: Identity or run metadata can memorize benchmark examples or experimental conditions.
Post-forward and confounded by hardware, node load, and run ordering.
Constant run metadata, not a sample feature.

known_missing_fields: sender token length and sender/receiver token-length ratio

integrity.future_split_group_key: normalized question+choices SHA256; identical-content rows share a split
